selected_backend_rows.decision_decision: Do not broaden the SM120 direct-cuBLAS dInput selector to attention projection. Both the bundled attproj/MLP-up selector and the later attproj-only selector regressed in x10 TinyStories stability gates, so the source default remains the huge-N LM-head-only direct-cuBLAS dInput route.
decision_evidence: 2026-05-21 candidate selector round codex_sm120_round_cublas_dinp_attproj_fc_20260521 validated at avg_ms=2493.931
2026-05-21 x10 stability round codex_sm120_round_cublas_dinp_attproj_fc_x10_20260521 regressed to avg_ms=2502.950 versus current stable x10 2495.443 ms

2026-05-21 attproj-only selector hook LLMK_SM120_USE_CUBLAS_DINP_ATTPROJ passed all native smokes and 3-step validation at avg_ms=2491.581, but x10 stability round scratch/sm120_rounds/codex_sm120_round_cublas_dinp_attproj_only_x10_20260521 regressed to avg_ms=2503.023 versus current native x10 avg_ms=2493.133

selected_backend_rows.decision_decision: Keep the training-backed current native row on cuBLASLt for the GPT-2 MLP projection dInput path. The earlier current-source x10 native round selected cuBLAS, but the stream-sync x10 native round and optional-stack benchmark both select cuBLASLt, and a narrow direct-cuBLAS trainer selector regressed badly in x3 TinyStories.
decision_evidence: 2026-05-21 optional-stack round codex_sm120_round_torch_attention_materialized_20260521: cuBLASLt 1372.02 us versus cuBLAS 1415.14 us
2026-05-21 current-source x10 native round codex_sm120_round_current_native_x10_median_20260521: cuBLAS 1380.08 us versus cuBLASLt 1405.13 us with TinyStories avg_ms=2496.245
2026-05-21 stream-sync default x10 round codex_sm120_round_backward_stream_sync_default_x10_20260521: cuBLASLt 1381.46 us versus cuBLAS 1383.67 us with TinyStories avg_ms=2493.133
Current stable x10 selection codex_sm120_round_current_default_x10_after_memory_20260520 selected cuBLASLt 1396.66 us
2026-05-21 narrow LLMK_SM120_USE_CUBLAS_DINP_FCPROJ trainer selector passed correctness and normal loss/norm checks but averaged 2651.203 ms over x3 TinyStories, so it does not justify an x10 gate

selected_backend_rows.decision_decision: Keep the cuBLASLt fused dGELU trainer route as the default. The opt-in TK exact-dGELU selector now passes correctness and has a focused row win, but its x10 TinyStories stability round regressed versus the current stable default.
decision_evidence: 2026-05-20 target-context test_matmul with LLMK_SM120_USE_TK_FUSED_DGELU_DINP failed only the GPT-2 fcproj fused dGELU dInput row with max abs diff 0.500000 against the strict <0.50 gate
2026-05-21 opt-in exact-dGELU selector test_matmul passed 10/10; GPT-2 fcproj fused dGELU dInput max abs diff was 0.125000
2026-05-21 focused LLMK_BENCH_REPEATS=7 bench_sm120_matmul measured TK exact dInp+dGeLU 1761.68 us versus cuBLASLt fused 1855.33 us

selection_policy: Fastest observed row per exact suite/kernel/shape. Rows without an existing trainer call path remain reference/operator prototypes until route-specific correctness and TinyStories smoke evidence proves promotion. Repo-local decisions mark refreshed rejects and structurally non-promotable rows inactive without deleting their evidence.
